title: Garlicky Green Bean Stew
description: A hearty stew made with green beans, garlicky flavors, and a hint of jamaican spices. Perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the green beans and cook for 3-4 minutes until they start to soften.
Add the Jamaican seasoning, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the stew beans and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-12 minutes until the green beans are tender.
